message:
fix(web): defense-in-depth CRLF sanitization in Response header methods

Adds sanitize_header_value() to strip CR/LF from all header values at
the Response infrastructure level (set_header, ensure_header, tuple
IntoResponse). Previously only Redirect had inline CRLF stripping,
leaving other header-setting paths vulnerable to response header
injection via client-controlled data.

7 regression tests added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
